claim: YOLO demand evidence schema, readiness contract, and tests all distinguish project, external, user, and unknown evidence scopes with path locator requirements for project facts.

evidence.summary: Four comprehensive test cases verify PRD readiness blocking when: all evidence is external-only (lines 340-385), project evidence lacks path locator (387-431), external URLs are mislabeled as project scope (433-478), and scope field is missing (480-524).
evidence.why: Test suite provides executable contract proving scope separation and path requirements are enforced at readiness gates.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues function returns PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker when no project-scoped evidence exists, or PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED when project evidence lacks path locator.
evidence.why: Core validation logic preventing non-project evidence from satisfying existing-project fact requirements.

evidence.summary: PRD readiness inspection integrates scope validation by calling evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues for each complete evidence result.
evidence.why: Readiness contract explicitly checks scope requirements before marking demand as PRD-ready.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt generates agent instructions with hard rules requiring scope declaration and path locators for project facts.
evidence.why: Agent prompt contract ensures evidence agents are instructed on scope requirements from the start.

evidence.summary: Demand doctrine documents evidence scope requirements in Chinese: project evidence requires path locators, external evidence is background-only.
evidence.why: Product documentation confirms scope separation is a deliberate design requirement.

risks: Evidence scope validation could have false positives that block valid evidence.
Path locator inference logic could fail to detect project paths, causing misclassification.
Agents could fabricate paths to mislabel external evidence as project scope.

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker evidence are in complete agreement. All 30 combined evidence records are project-scoped with valid path locators. No assumptions are presented as facts. No missing data identified. Test suite provides executable contract proving scope separation and path requirements are enforced at PRD readiness gates. Evidence supports claim with high confidence.
